programme.title: Criminal Minds
programme.desc: When Kate's niece Meg and her best friend are kidnapped, the BAU suspects an online predator engaged in sex trafficking.

programme.title: Criminal Minds
programme.desc: The BAU searches for a serial killer who leaves distinctive marks on victims' faces with the help of an impressive potential new team member, forensic psychologist Dr. Tara Lewis (Aisha Tyler).

programme.title: Criminal Minds
programme.desc: When a Los Angeles bus is attacked with sarin gas, the BAU must act quickly to find the suspect before a larger-scale incident occurs. Marisol Nichols and Tim Kang guest star.

programme.title: Criminal Minds
programme.desc: When brides-to-be in Savannah are killed on the eve of their nuptials, the BAU suspects a jilted UnSub is at work. Michael Irvin, Ashley Fink, and Mancow Muller guest star.

programme.title: Criminal Minds
programme.desc: When three restaurant workers are killed in a robbery/homicide in Las Vegas, the BAU looks at a cold case that happened in the town six years ago for leads.

programme.title: Criminal Minds
programme.desc: When the BAU investigates incidents of bodies being incorporated into macabre graffiti art in Detroit, they suspect an elusive-yet-notorious street artist could be the UnSub. Dr. Lewis struggles to balance her relationship with her fiancé and her work.

programme.title: Criminal Minds
programme.desc: When a woman is murdered in a small town in Florida, the BAU faces a community full of suspects. Also, Lewis receives a career opportunity that may take her away from the BAU.

programme.title: Criminal Minds
programme.desc: The BAU helps Rossi's journalist daughter, Joy, investigate the disappearance of a college student. Also, the team is alarmed when Giuseppe Montolo dies in prison after he warns Morgan about the 'Dirty Dozen,' an underground group of hitmen.

programme.title: Criminal Minds
programme.desc: The BAU hunts an UnSub in Phoenix who is kidnapping victims and depriving them of sleep. Also, Hotch and Garcia deal with the threat from the underground hitman group, the 'Dirty Dozen.'

programme.title: Criminal Minds
programme.desc: After two undercover DEA agents are murdered, the BAU joins the NSA to investigate whether an underground Internet drug syndicate is involved. Hotch hopes the team's work with the NSA brings them closer to finding the 'Dirty Dozen.'

programme.title: Criminal Minds
programme.desc: The BAU searches for an UnSub who may be fascinated with medical experimentation.

programme.title: Criminal Minds
programme.desc: The BAU implements an elaborate strategy to try and take down the 'Dirty Dozen' hitmen ring, with Reid playing a central role. Aubrey Plaza guest stars.

programme.title: Criminal Minds
programme.desc: When bodies are discovered in public places throughout Boston, the BAU investigates whether the victims used a taxi or ride-share service before their deaths.

programme.title: Criminal Minds
programme.desc: The BAU searches for a motive and an UnSub when victims are found in truck stop restrooms along highways throughout the South.

programme.title: Criminal Minds
programme.desc: When an 18-year-old girl escapes from a suburban home where she was held captive for years with two other women, the BAU searches for the Unsub who kidnapped them.

programme.title: Criminal Minds

programme.title: Criminal Minds

programme.desc: The BAU searches for an UnSub who is purposely disfiguring victims. Also, Rossi has an awkward reunion with his ex-wife, Hayden Montgomery, who kept his daughter, Joy, a secret from him for nearly 30 years. Sheryl Lee Ralph guest stars.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: Members of the Robertson family recall their favorite memories from the show and share how the popular series impacted their lives.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: Willie and Jase compete against each other to become president of their neighborhood homeowner association; Jep, Jess and Miss Kay work on a Duck Commander-themed display for the local zoo.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: The guys have fun with a 3-D printer until they come to the realization that the machine could soon replace their jobs; Si invests in John Luke's snow cone stand after Willie doesn't give him a raise.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: Jase, Jep, Si and Cole battle a growing population of cottonmouth snakes on Phil's property; Willie uses his business expertise to help Rebecca improve her clothing store.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: Little Will decides to buy a motorcycle instead of a car after Willie puts him on a budget; Jase and the guys get inspiration to design a revolutionary duck-hunting product involving zip lines.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: With many of the wives and children in Africa performing charity work, Willie and Jase have a debate over tracking ability; Jase and Si are challenged to track and capture Willie and Jep.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: Willie and Jep step in to supervise Bella's sleepover while Korie is away in Africa; Jase takes Si, Martin and Godwin for a round of night golf.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: Korie challenges Willie to come up with a romantic gesture without spending any money; Missy and Jase compete to see who can find a girlfriend for Mountain Man.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: Jase's hopes to win the inaugural Duck Commander Fishing Tournament is buoyed when he is able to enlist the help of angler Bill Dance; Willie's vanity over his greying beard leads him to make a questionable decision.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: Jase and Jep make a deal with Mia and Merritt to get them to go dove hunting; Si tries to make some extra money by starting a West Monroe tour.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: Willie institutes a "no-tech week" when he feels his children spend too much time on their phones, but has difficulty participating in his own program; the guys attempt to stop a lice outbreak at Duck Commander.

programme.title: JAG: The Boast
programme.desc: When an unwitting corporal boasts to a reporter that he killed an Iraqi prisoner of war, facts begin to emerge that could convict him despite his later claim that he was only lying toi mpress.

programme.title: JAG: Pulse Rate
programme.desc: Harm and Mac go aboard the USS Gillcrist to determine if a seaman’s fatal accident during a routine repair was the result of a co-worker’s dereliction of duty or worse.

programme.title: JAG: Good Intentions
programme.desc: Mac defends a petty officer and former alcoholic accused of a brutal murder after a drinking binge which renders him useless in remembering details that could help him. Roberts is entangled in the case of a Navy Commander accused of embezzling funds.

programme.title: JAG: People vs SECNAV
programme.desc: After an incident in Iraq claims the lives of innocent civilians, SecNav is brought up on charges of war crimes in International Court, and Harm and Mac must defend him. Meanwhile, during a trip to the arcade, little A.J. goes missing.

programme.title: JAG: Coming Home
programme.desc: A marine’s killing in Iraq has ramifications for JAG stateside as Harm helps the soldier’s family with a media onslaught, and Bud and Mac investigate the failure of his flack vest.

programme.title: JAG: Fighting Words
programme.desc: A general’s comments about Islam during a church service pit Harm and Mac against each other as a court-martial hearing examines whether those remarks were a danger to national security.

programme.title: JAG: One Big Boat
programme.desc: When a Naval Academy sailing team gets caught in a squall and a team member drowns, Mac and Turner must determine if their driven commander willingly put his crew at risk.

programme.title: JAG: Death At The Mosque
programme.desc: Vukovic is sent to Iraq to defend a Marine who was caught on tape killing a seemingly innocent Iraqi civilian.

programme.title: JAG: Dream Team
programme.desc: A sailor dies during a fight aboard a ship at sea; Bud discovers the explanation. Mattie wakes up and talks. The general announces a reorganization, orders, and a promotion.

programme.title: JAG: Pilot, Part 1 & 2
programme.desc: A woman radar-intercept officer (RIO) disappears at night from an aircraft carrier in the Adriatic Sea. Two JAG lawyers, Lt. Harm Rabb and Lt. Caitlin Pike, investigate and solve. Harm, a former Naval aviator, unexpectedly becomes a hero.

programme.title: JAG: Shadow
programme.desc: A civilian tech rep aboard a submarine seizes control of an experimental torpedo after its launch during an exercise

programme.title: JAG: déjà vu (AKA Soldier of Love)
programme.desc: Three Navy lieutenants die by homicide in 11 months around Washington. Harm and Meg investigate

programme.title: JAG: Desert Son
programme.desc: Due to a human error in an exercise, artillery fire injures seven Marines, one of whom later dies.

programme.title: JAG: Brig Break
programme.desc: A sailor has stolen two Stinger missiles from a base. Harm and Meg investigate.

programme.title: JAG: Pilot Error
programme.desc: Two Naval aviators die in a crash of an F-14 while using a new fly-by-wire navigation system.

programme.title: JAG: Pilot Error
programme.desc: Two Naval aviators die in a crash of an F-14 while using a new fly-by-wire navigation system.

programme.title: JAG: War Cries
programme.desc: In Lima, Peru, while a boy sneaks into the US embassy at night, a Marine guard stops him.

programme.title: JAG: War Cries
programme.desc: In Lima, Peru, while a boy sneaks into the US embassy at night, a Marine guard stops him.

programme.title: JAG: Sightings
programme.desc: In south Texas, residents have reported strange phenomena, stories of supernatural events have abounded, and a 10-year-old girl has disappeared.

programme.title: JAG: Sightings
programme.desc: In south Texas, residents have reported strange phenomena, stories of supernatural events have abounded, and a 10-year-old girl has disappeared.

programme.title: JAG: Scimitar
programme.desc: Two Marines in a Humvee mistakenly drive into Iraq; an Iraqi detail intercepts them, kills one, and captures the other.

programme.title: JAG: Scimitar
programme.desc: Two Marines in a Humvee mistakenly drive into Iraq; an Iraqi detail intercepts them, kills one, and captures the other.

programme.title: JAG: Defensive Action
programme.desc: A patrolling F-14 malfunctions in a no-fly zone; the crew ejects, and the bird explodes.

programme.title: JAG: Defensive Action
programme.desc: A patrolling F-14 malfunctions in a no-fly zone; the crew ejects, and the bird explodes.

programme.title: JAG: Boot.
programme.desc: A woman Marine recruit dies at Parris Island. Harm investigates while Meg poses undercover as a recruit.

programme.desc: During a landing exercise Marines find a beaten, comatose fellow Marine on the beach

programme.title: JAG: Hemlock
programme.desc: By mistake a foreign agent sends a fax to Meg's office; then he retrieves it and shoots Meg to prevent her from identifying him

programme.title: JAG: High Ground
programme.desc: A Marine sniper receives orders contrary to a previous deal; his CO refuses to listen; the sniper takes a shot at the CO's Humvee.

programme.desc: A Marine sniper receives orders contrary to a previous deal; his CO refuses to listen; the sniper takes a shot at the CO's Humvee.

programme.desc: A Naval aviator, while temporarily assigned to a SEAL team, drowns at sea; he was the son of a woman senator.

programme.title: The Sons Of Katie Elder
programme.desc: Katie Elderin neljä levotonta poikaa palaa kotiin äidin hautajaisiin kostaakseen hänen kuolemansa.

programme.title: In Harm's Way
programme.desc: Tuottaja-ohjaaja Otto Premingerin eeppinen kertomus iskusta Pearl Harboriin sisältää yksityiskohtaisen kuvauksen hyökkäyksestä meritukikohtaan sekä räjähtäviä tarinoita kulissien takaa.

programme.title: Rio Lobo
programme.desc: Viides ja viimeinen John Waynen ja ohjaaja Howard Hawksin yhteinen elokuva on toiminnantäyteinen länkkäri sisällissodan jälkeisestä ajasta, jolloin joukko miehiä etsii liittovaltion pettureita, jotka ovat vastuussa junaryöstöjen sarjasta.

programme.title: Hondo
programme.desc: John Wayne näyttelee ratsuväkeen kuuluvaa Hondo Lanea, josta tulee Angie Lowen suojelija sekä isähahmo tämän Johnny-pojalle. Angie on päättänyt odottaa aviomiehensä paluuta eikä suostu lähtemään kotitilalta vaaroista huolimatta.

programme.title: Dakota
programme.desc: In 1871 Dakota, two crooked businessmen oppose the local wheat farmers and the railroad development, in order to control the town of Fargo.

programme.title: Paluuta ei ole
programme.desc: John Wayne esittää elämän kolhimaa lentoperämiestä, jonka kokemusta tarvitaan katastrofiksi kääntyvällä lennolla Tyynenmeren yllä.

programme.title: Paluuta ei ole
programme.desc: John Wayne esittää elämän kolhimaa lentoperämiestä, jonka kokemusta tarvitaan katastrofiksi kääntyvällä lennolla Tyynenmeren yllä.

programme.title: The Fighting Kentuckian
programme.desc: Leading a regiment of Kentucky riflemen during the War of 1812, John Wayne is the frontiersman who battles to save his love and his homeland from speculators, after the Battle of New Orleans.

programme.title: The Fighting Kentuckian
programme.desc: Leading a regiment of Kentucky riflemen during the War of 1812, John Wayne is the frontiersman who battles to save his love and his homeland from speculators, after the Battle of New Orleans.

programme.title: Flying Tigers
programme.desc: John Wayne adds luster to this early WWII film about the famous P-40 Flying Group who soared into battle against the Japanese in defense of China's freedom.

programme.title: Flying Tigers
programme.desc: John Wayne adds luster to this early WWII film about the famous P-40 Flying Group who soared into battle against the Japanese in defense of China's freedom.

programme.title: The Dark Command
programme.desc: A Civil War tale based on the exploits of the notorious outlaw William Quantrill. A courageous sheriff stands up to Quantrill and his band of guerrillas pillaging the countryside in Civil War-torn Kansas, and stops the raids.

programme.desc: A Civil War tale based on the exploits of the notorious outlaw William Quantrill. A courageous sheriff stands up to Quantrill and his band of guerrillas pillaging the countryside in Civil War-torn Kansas, and stops the raids.

programme.desc: The Duke stars as George Washington McLintock, a defiant cattle baron whose daughter Becky is due home from college. But G.W.'s reunion with his daughter is tempered by the arrival of his wife Katherine, who left him two years earlier.

programme.title: Allo 'Allo!
programme.desc: Herr Flick ist im Verlies des Chateaus gefangen. Helga und von Schmalhausen wollen in befreien.

programme.title: Allo 'Allo!
programme.desc: Leutnant Gruber gelingt es, René aus dem Verlies zu befreien, doch schon kommt Michelle mit neuen Plänen.

programme.title: Allo 'Allo!
programme.desc: Die Fotos, die René vom Safe gemacht hat, sind entwickelt worden. Jetzt gilt es, den Safe zu knacken.

programme.title: Allo 'Allo!
programme.desc: René und Leclerc gelingt es, den Safe zu sprengen, doch darin befindet sich nicht das, wonach sie suchen.

programme.title: Allo 'Allo!
programme.desc: Überraschend stellt sich heraus, dass Denise, Chefin der kommunistischen Résistance, Renés Jugendliebe ist.

programme.title: Allo 'Allo!
programme.desc: Alle sind mit der bevorstehenden Hochzeit beschäftigt.

programme.title: Allo 'Allo!
programme.desc: René hat sich als sein eigener Vater verkleidet, da Denise die Flucht aus dem Bergwerksschacht gelungen ist.

programme.title: Allo 'Allo!
programme.desc: René bekommt eine Langstreckenente, die die Fotos der Invasionspläne nach England fliegen soll.

programme.title: Allo 'Allo!
programme.desc: René soll mit einer hanebüchenen Apparatur auf der Konferenz der Generäle die Invasionspläne fotografieren.

programme.title: Allo 'Allo!
programme.desc: René steht unter Verdacht, bei der Konferenz einen Mordanschlag auf die Generäle verübt zu haben.

programme.title: Allo 'Allo!
programme.desc: Michelle will weitere englische Flieger, als Zwiebelverkäufer verkleidet, in Renés Café versammeln.

programme.title: Allo 'Allo!
programme.desc: Die kommunistische Résistance hält René und Mimi immer noch im Hauptquartier fest.

programme.title: Allo 'Allo!
programme.desc: Herr Flick entdeckt mit Entsetzen, dass seine Ersparnisse nach dem Bankraub verschwunden sind.

programme.title: Allo 'Allo!
programme.desc: Bei der gestohlenen Gestapo-Million aus der Bank handelt es sich um Falschgeld, was aber nur Flick weiß.

programme.title: Allo 'Allo!
programme.desc: Leutnant Gruber und der Oberst haben erfahren, dass Monsieur Alfonse von der Gestapo verhört werden soll.

programme.title: Bergerac
programme.desc: Nach seiner Rückkehr nach Jersey muss sich Bergerac dem schwierigsten Fall seiner Karriere stellen.

programme.title: Bergerac
programme.desc: Wer ist der Mann, der sich als Sergeant Bergerac ausgibt - und warum sind so viele Leute hinter ihm her?

programme.title: Bergerac
programme.desc: Eine archäologische Ausgrabung setzt eine erschreckende Kette von Ereignissen in Gang.

programme.title: Bergerac
programme.desc: Bergerac deckt die Wahrheit auf, als ein Mann und seine Tochter Opfer von Terror werden.

programme.title: Blackadder II
programme.desc: England 1560: Lord Edmund Blackadder hat sich in den frühen Tagen der Regentschaft von Elisabeth I. verliebt.

programme.title: Blackadder II
programme.desc: Endlich mal ein gewichtiger Posten für Edmund: Er ist vom Hofe zum obersten Scharfrichter ernannt worden.

programme.title: Inspector Foyle
programme.desc: In einer Zeit, in der deutsche Staatsangehörige in britischen Lagern interniert werden, wird die schöne deutsche Ehefrau des örtlichen Richters von den Einheimischen mit Argwohn betrachtet.

programme.title: Inspector Foyle
programme.desc: In einer Zeit, in der deutsche Staatsangehörige in britischen Lagern interniert werden, wird die schöne deutsche Ehefrau des örtlichen Richters von den Einheimischen mit Argwohn betrachtet.

programme.title: Inspector Foyle
programme.desc: Die Gemeinde hat einen weiteren Toten zu verzeichnen: Der Wirt stirbt bei einem Autounfall mit Fahrerflucht. Foyle hatte zuvor um eine Versetzung zu einem lebhafteren Einsatz gebeten, ändert jedoch seine Meinung.

programme.title: Inspector Foyle
programme.desc: Die Verhaftung eines jungen Mädchens wegen Sabotagevorwürfen bringt Foyle in Kontakt mit dem Friday Club, einer Pro-Hitler-Organisation.

programme.desc: Die Verhaftung eines jungen Mädchens wegen Sabotagevorwürfen bringt Foyle in Kontakt mit dem Friday Club, einer Pro-Hitler-Organisation.

programme.title: Inspector Foyle
programme.desc: Detektive Foyle und Sergeant Milner stoßen auf eine Vielzahl von Spuren, darunter den Fischerfreund des Saboteurs, einen verschwundenen Brief aus dem Außenministerium, einen Geheimdienstagenten der Armee und einen Ladenbesitzer.
